data.title: Update system-landscape.md plugin boundary section and llms.txt artifact dirs
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

TDD exemption applies: documentation-only change (Markdown + text files), no conditional logic, any test would be a change-detector test asserting string presence in static files.

## Implementation Steps

### 1. docs/reference/system-landscape.md
Add a new '## Plugin Distribution Boundary' section. Insert after the 'Portability Lint' section (or before '## Constraints' / at end of file before any trailing sections). Content:

## Plugin Distribution Boundary

The DSO plugin occupies two distinct directory scopes that must not be conflated:

| Scope | Path | Contents |
|-------|------|----------|
| Distributed plugin artifact | `plugins/dso/` | Agents, skills, hooks, scripts, config, reference docs — shipped with the plugin and installed in host projects |
| Project-local dev-team artifacts | `docs/designs/`, `docs/findings/`, `docs/archive/` | Design documents, investigation findings, archived artifacts — created by the development team working on this project; never distributed |

Dev-team artifacts belong in project-local directories and are never shipped as part of the plugin. The `plugins/dso/` tree contains only plugin-shipped content. See CLAUDE.md Critical Rules rule 26 for the enforcement rule.

Also update the `last_synced_commit` frontmatter to the current HEAD commit hash: fe236836763854695b45bc3b1f32a0253a48a4be

### 2. llms.txt
Add entries for the three project-local artifact directories. Find the appropriate navigation section (or add after existing docs/ entries) and include:

docs/designs/ — design and UI artifacts (wireframes, spatial layouts, design manifests)
docs/findings/ — investigation results and research findings
docs/archive/ — superseded documents and archived artifacts

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] docs/reference/system-landscape.md contains a section describing the plugin distribution boundary
  Verify: grep -q 'Plugin Distribution Boundary\|plugin distribution boundary\|distributed plugin artifact' docs/reference/system-landscape.md
- [ ] system-landscape.md mentions docs/designs/, docs/findings/, docs/archive/ as project-local dirs
  Verify: grep -q 'docs/designs/' docs/reference/system-landscape.md && grep -q 'docs/findings/' docs/reference/system-landscape.md && grep -q 'docs/archive/' docs/reference/system-landscape.md
- [ ] system-landscape.md last_synced_commit frontmatter updated to current HEAD
  Verify: grep 'last_synced_commit' docs/reference/system-landscape.md | grep -q '[0-9a-f]\{7,\}'
- [ ] llms.txt contains entries for docs/designs/, docs/findings/, docs/archive/
  Verify: grep -q 'docs/designs/' llms.txt && grep -q 'docs/findings/' llms.txt && grep -q 'docs/archive/' llms.txt
- [ ] No Tier 3 living doc contains references to plugins/dso/docs/designs/, plugins/dso/docs/findings/, or plugins/dso/docs/archive/
  Verify: test $(git grep -rl 'plugins/dso/docs/designs\|plugins/dso/docs/findings\|plugins/dso/docs/archive' docs/reference/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l) -eq 0
- [ ] validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
